action_classes.retain: keep live and compact only by view or reference
action_classes.dedupe_by_reference: replace identical siblings with manifest-backed references
action_classes.archive: keep packed until promotion threshold is met
action_classes.promote_live: extract into a routed live root with lineage witness

compression_profiles.runtime_code: retain code + verify behavior instead of lossy compression
compression_profiles.witness_document: preserve source witness + edit through mirrors or capsules
compression_profiles.archive_bundle: archive until promotion threshold is met

docs_gate_policy.disallowed_behavior: claiming live docs sync without authenticated proof
